response.justification: Bogdan's profile is almost entirely TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and full-stack development. While he has tangential geospatial exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, these are web-based GIS applications, not routing data pipelines or tiling systems. His C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project — neither constitutes the modern, production-grade C++ (or Rust) expertise this role demands. There is no evidence of navigation systems work, routing tile generation, or low-latency data pipeline engineering at the scale described in the job description.
strengths: Geospatial domain exposure via GISCollective and Green Map projects shows familiarity with geodata concepts
High-performance, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby with async I/O and micro-services handling millions of requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and Linux comfort
concerns: No modern C++ commercial experience; C++ appears only in a 6-month role from 2014 and a university thesis
Zero Rust experience listed anywhere in the resume
No routing, navigation guidance, or tiling pipeline work — geospatial experience is limited to web-based data collection tools
